purpose: Convert every substantive owner request into source-accounted, routed, tracked and independently verified Jarvis work without silently losing prior requirements.
standing_rules: Capture each substantive request as append-only atomic requirements with source pointers.
Route each requirement to the best-fit module and additionally inherit universal controls across all applicable Jarvis modules.
Update the canonical progress tracker, continuity ledger, source denominator, gap register, evidence links and rollback record in the same governed tranche.
Continue the first safe incomplete task whenever the environment and approval state permit.
Never claim 100 percent historical completeness without a measured source denominator and coverage evidence.
Mark unavailable chats, exports, files, credentials and runtime evidence PENDING_INGEST or BLOCKED rather than guessing.
Preserve separate business, asset and specialist namespaces while reusing shared Jarvis services.
Require owner approval before billing, credential changes, public publishing, production promotion, destructive actions, outreach, money movement or live trading.
completion_rule: Requirement -> Module -> Artifact -> Test or Waiver -> Evidence -> Rollback is mandatory before DONE_VERIFIED.
truth_boundary: This policy governs future intake and currently accessible sources. It does not prove that inaccessible historical chats or exports have already been ingested.
